steps.title: Express the width
steps.content: The length is $x$ inches, and it is $5$ inches greater than the width. Therefore, the width is $x-5$ inches.

steps.title: Build the volume function
steps.content: Volume equals length times width times height: $$ V(x)=x(x-5)(8) $$ Reorder the factors: $$ V(x)=8x(x-5) $$ The answer is D.
